ingredients.item:
3 x 400g cans chickpeas (reserve the liquid of 1¼ cans)
about 4 tbsp olive oil, plus extra for drizzling
4 tbsp garlic oil
juice of 3 lemons
4 tbsp light tahini
2 tbsp crushed sea salt
sprinkling of paprika, to garnish
ingredients.original:
3 x 400g cans chickpeas (reserve the liquid of 1¼ cans)
about 4 tbsp olive oil, plus extra for drizzling
4 tbsp garlic oil
juice of 3 lemons
4 tbsp light tahini
2 tbsp crushed sea salt
sprinkling of paprika, to garnish

ingredients.item: To make a Lemon & Coriander Hummus, add 20g very finely chopped coriander leaves and the juice of 1½ more lemons to the recipe above and mix well. Serve with a drizzle of olive oil and scatter over more chopped coriander if desired.
ingredients.original: To make a Lemon & Coriander Hummus, add 20g very finely chopped coriander leaves and the juice of 1½ more lemons to the recipe above and mix well. Serve with a drizzle of olive oil and scatter over more chopped coriander if desired.
